title: Section 20
content: 1[20. Transmission of orders to the Central Government and its publication.--The Supreme Court shall, after announcing the orders made under section 17, send a copy thereof to the Central Government, and on receipt of such copy the Central Government shall forthwith cause the order to be published in the Official Gazette.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 20 of 1977, s. 2, for Part III.
